profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for Fast-hosted data services.

service.name: Facebook Ad Library Scraper
service.tagline: Extract Meta Ad Library results and page-level ads through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: Facebook Ad Library Scraper exposes an Apify-backed ad intelligence workflow through the marketplace for competitor research, creative monitoring, and paid social analysis from Ad Library searches or known page URLs.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the Facebook Ad Library Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Provide either an Ad Library search URL or a list of Facebook page URLs.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Search Ads
endpoints.description: Extract ads from a Facebook Ad Library search result URL or from a list of Facebook pages.
endpoints.usageNotes: Use an Ad Library search URL for keyword monitoring, or page URLs when you already know the advertisers you want to track.
